  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Credit Agreement also contains negative covenants that limit our ability to engage in specified types of transactions. These covenants limit our ability to, among other things, sell, lease or transfer any properties or assets, with certain exceptions; and enter into certain merger, consolidation or other reorganization transactions, with certain exceptions.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">A breach of any of these covenants could result in an event of default under our credit facility. Upon the occurrence of an event of default, the lender could elect to declare all amounts outstanding under such facility to be immediately due and payable and terminate all commitments to extend further credit. In addition, the Company would be subject to additional restrictions if an event of default exists under the Credit Agreement, such as a prohibition on the payment of cash dividends.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>Our share price will fluctuate.</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Over the last several years, stock markets in general and our common stock in particular have experienced significant price and volume volatility. Both the market price and the daily trading volume of our common stock may continue to be subject to significant fluctuations due not only to general stock market conditions but also to a change in sentiment in the market regarding our operations and business prospects. In addition to the risk factors discussed above, the price and volume volatility of our common stock may be affected by:</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width: 100%; text-indent: 0px;">
   <tbody>
    <tr style="vertical-align: top;">
     <td style="width: 18pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 18pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#x2022;</p> </td>
     <td> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">operating results that vary from our financial guidance or the expectations of securities analysts and investors;</p> </td>
    </tr>

    <tr style="vertical-align: top;">
     <td style="width: 18pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 18pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#x2022;</p> </td>
     <td> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">the financial performance of the major end markets that we target;</p> </td>
    </tr>

    <tr style="vertical-align: top;">
     <td style="width: 18pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 18pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#x2022;</p> </td>
     <td> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">the operating and securities price performance of companies that investors consider to be comparable to us;</p> </td>
    </tr>

    <tr style="vertical-align: top;">
     <td style="width: 18pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 18pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#x2022;</p> </td>
     <td> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">announcements of strategic developments, acquisitions and other material events by us or our competitors; and</p> </td>
    </tr>

    <tr style="vertical-align: top;">
     <td style="width: 18pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 18pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#x2022;</p> </td>
     <td> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">changes in global financial markets and global economies and general market conditions, such as interest or foreign exchange rates, commodity and equity prices and the value of financial assets.</p> </td>
    </tr>

   </tbody>
  </table>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>Dividends on our common stock could be reduced or eliminated in the future.</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 18pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">For over 10 years, our Board has consistently declared quarterly dividends of $0.25 to $0.32 cents per share. In the future, our Board may determine to reduce or eliminate our common stock dividend in order to fund investments for growth, repurchase shares or conserve capital resources.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item1b" title="item1b" href="#"></a>ITEM 1B. UNRESOLVED STAFF COMMENTS</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">There are no unresolved staff comments as of the date of this report.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item2" title="item2" href="#"></a>ITEM 2. PROPERTIES</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company owns the facilities that its headquarters and R&amp;D Systems subsidiary occupy in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The Minneapolis facilities are utilized by both the Company's Protein Sciences&#xa0;and Diagnostics and Genomics segments.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Minneapolis complex includes approximately 800,000 square feet of space in several adjoining buildings. Bio-Techne uses approximately 625,000 square feet of the complex for administrative, research, manufacturing, shipping and warehousing activities. The Company is currently leasing&#xa0;the remaining space in the complex as retail and office space.&#xa0;The Company also owns a 54,000 square foot facility in Saint Paul, Minnesota that will be utilized for&#xa0;additional manufacturing&#xa0;capabilities and activities. </p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company also owns a 34,000 square foot manufacturing facility in Flowery Branch, Georgia. This facility is utilized by the Company&#x2019;s Protein Sciences.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company owns a 17,000 square foot facility that its Bio-Techne Europe subsidiary occupies in Abingdon, England. This facility is utilized by the Company's Protein Sciences and Diagnostics and&#xa0;Genomics&#xa0;segments.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company owns a 9,000 square foot facility that its Canada subsidiaries occupy in&#xa0;Toronto, Canada.&#xa0;This facility is utilized by the Company's Protein Sciences and Diagnostics and&#xa0;Genomics&#xa0;segments.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company leases the following material facilities, all of which are primarily utilized by the Company's Protein Sciences segment with the exception of the locations used by the Company's ProteinSimple and CyVek subsidiaries, which support both the Protein Sciences segment and the Diagnostics &amp; Genomics segment). Certain locations are not named because they were not significant individually or in the aggregate as of the date of this report.</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item3" title="item3" href="#"></a>ITEM 3. LEGAL PROCEEDINGS</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As of August 26, 2020, the Company is not a party to any legal proceedings that, individually or in the aggregate, are reasonably expected to have a material adverse effect on the Company's business, results of operations, financial condition or cash flows.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item4" title="item4" href="#"></a>ITEM 4. MINE SAFETY DISCLOSURES</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Not applicable.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><b><a id="part2" title="part2" href="#"></a>PART II</b></span></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item5" title="item5" href="#"></a>ITEM 5. MARKET FOR THE REGISTRANT'S COMMON EQUITY, RELATED SHAREHOLDER</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>MATTERS AND ISSUER PURCHASES OF EQUITY SECURITIES</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Holders of Common Stock and Dividends Paid</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&#xa0;</i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">As <span style="background-color:null;">of August 21, 2020</span>&#xa0;there were over 55,000&#xa0;beneficial shareholders of the Company's common stock and over&#xa0;125&#xa0;shareholders of record. The Company paid&#xa0;annual cash dividends totaling $48.9 million, $48.4 million, and $48.0 million&#xa0;in fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018, respectively. The Board of Directors periodically considers the payment of cash dividends, and there is no guarantee that the Company will pay comparable cash dividends, or any cash dividends, in the future.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In connection with the acquisition of Exosome Diagnostics, Inc. on August 1, 2018, the Company entered into a new credit facility that provides for a revolving credit facility of $600 million, which can be increased by an additional $200 million subject to certain conditions,&#xa0;and a term loan of $250 million.&#xa0; The credit facility is governed by a Credit Agreement dated August 1, 2018 and matures on August 1, 2023.&#xa0; The Credit Agreement that governs the revolving line of credit contains customary events of default and would prohibit payment of dividends to Company shareholders in the event of a default thereunder.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Issuer Purchases of Equity Securities</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>&#xa0;</i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During the years ended June 30, 2020 and June 30, 2019, the Company repurchased 279,381&#xa0;shares of its common stock at an average share price of $179.37&#xa0;and 95,000 shares at an average share price of $162.15, respectively. <span style="background-color:null;">As of June 30, 2018, the maximum approximate dollar value of shares that could have been purchased under the Company's then existing stock repurchase plan was approximately $125 million, with no specified end period. During fiscal 2019, the Board rescinded the existing stock repurchase plan and implemented a new repurchase plan, which grants management </span>the discretion to mitigate the dilutive effect of stock option exercises by authorizing repurchase of shares up to the amount of stock returned to the corporation through stock option exercises, beginning with those option exercises occurring&#xa0;in fiscal year 2018.&#xa0;As of June 30, 2020, we have authorization of approximately $58&#xa0;million that may yet be used to purchase additional shares under our current stock repurchase program.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <div class="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-left: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt">
   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">

  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b><a id="item7" title="item7" href="#"></a>ITEM 7. MANAGEMENT'S DISCUSSION AND ANALYSIS OF FINANCIAL</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>CONDITION AND RESULTS OF OPERATIONS</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The following management discussion and analysis (&#x201c;MD&amp;A&#x201d;) provides information that we believe is useful in understanding our operating results, cash flows and financial condition. We provide quantitative information about the material sales drivers including the effect of acquisitions and changes in foreign currency at the corporate and segment level. We also provide quantitative information about discrete tax items and other significant factors we believe are useful for understanding our results. The MD&amp;A should be read in conjunction with the consolidated financial information and related notes included in this Form 10-K. This discussion contains various &#x201c;Non-GAAP Financial Measures&#x201d; and also contains various &#x201c;Forward-Looking Statements&#x201d; within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. We refer readers to the statements entitled &#x201c;Non-GAAP Financial Measures&#x201d; located at the end of this MD&amp;A and &#x201c;Forward-Looking Information and Cautionary Statements&#x201d; and &#x201c;Risk Factors&#x201d; within Items 1 and 1A of this Form 10-K.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>OVERVIEW</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Bio-Techne&#xa0;develops, manufactures and sells life science reagents, instruments and services for the research and clinical diagnostic markets worldwide. With our deep product portfolio and application expertise, we sell integral components of scientific investigations into biological processes and molecular diagnostics, revealing the nature, diagnosis, etiology and progression of specific diseases. Our products aid in drug discovery efforts and provide the means for accurate clinical tests and diagnoses.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During our fiscal year 2020, we operated with two operating&#xa0;segments &#x2013; our Protein Sciences segment and our Diagnostics and Genomics segment. Our Protein Sciences segment is a leading developer and manufacturer of high-quality purified proteins and reagent solutions, most notably cytokines and growth factors, antibodies, immunoassays, biologically active small molecule compounds, tissue culture reagents and T-Cell activation technologies. This segment also includes protein analysis solutions that offer researchers efficient and streamlined options for automated western blot and multiplexed ELISA workflow. Our Genomics and Diagnostics segment develops and manufactures diagnostic products, including FDA-regulated controls, calibrators, blood gas and clinical chemistry controls and other reagents for OEM and clinical customers, as well as a portfolio of clinical molecular diagnostic oncology assays, including the ExoDx&#xae;<i>Prostate(IntelliScore)</i> test (EPI) for prostate cancer diagnosis. This segment also manufactures and sells advanced tissue-based in-situ hybridization assays (ISH) for research and clinical use.&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>OVERALL RESULTS</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>Operational Update</i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">For fiscal 2020, consolidated net sales&#xa0;increased 4% as compared to fiscal 2019.&#xa0;Organic growth was 4%, with currency translation and acquisitions having an immaterial impact on revenue. The Company experienced&#xa0;broad-based organic revenue growth in most major geographic regions and end-markets&#xa0;prior&#xa0;to the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. This broad-based organic growth was partially offset by the negative&#xa0;impacts associated with the COVID-19 pandemic experienced by the Company in the latter half of fiscal year 2020, as further described in the <i>COVID-19 Business Update</i> section.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">For fiscal 2020, consolidated earnings increased 139% compared to fiscal 2019. The increase in earnings was primarily due to&#xa0;a gain of approximately $137 million&#xa0;on our ChemoCentryx investment and a gain of approximately $7 million on the settlement of the escrow balance associated with the Exosome acquisition.&#xa0;After adjusting for acquisition related costs, stock-based compensation,&#xa0;and certain income tax items in both years, adjusted net earnings increased 2% in fiscal 2020&#xa0;as compared to fiscal 2019. Adjusted earnings growth was driven by&#xa0;volume leverage, which was partially offset by business impacts associated with the COVID-19 pandemic.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">For fiscal 2019, consolidated net sales increased 11% as compared to fiscal 2018. Organic growth for the year was&#xa0;10% with currency translation&#xa0;having an unfavorable impact of&#xa0;1% and acquisitions contributing 2%. The organic growth was broad-based with double digit organic growth in the United States, high single digit organic growth in Europe, and over 25%&#xa0;organic growth in China.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Consolidated GAAP net earnings decreased&#xa0;24% for fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018. After adjusting for acquisition related costs, stock-based compensation,&#xa0;and certain income tax items in both years, adjusted net earnings increased 2% in fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018. Adjusted earnings growth was driven by&#xa0;volume leverage, which was partially offset by negative margin acquisitions.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i>COVID-19 Business Update</i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">COVID-19 negatively impacted fiscal year 2020 sales growth due to the numerous customer site shutdowns in our academia and bio-pharma end-markets that occurred at the end of our third fiscal quarter and continued through&#xa0;our fourth quarter. Customer site shutdowns will continue to have a negative impact on sales while they remain in effect, but we did experience an increase in the number of customer sites that were open at the end of the fourth quarter. However, we are unable to forecast the impact of customer site closures given the uncertainty that some customer sites may close again due to increases in COVID-19 cases occurring in their region and over the duration of the COVID-19 pandemic. Once the pandemic has eased, we&#xa0;anticipate&#xa0;a positive long-term outlook for sales growth resulting from expected future funding increases within life-science research in response to the current pandemic.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company has responded to the pandemic by leveraging our deep product portfolio and scientific expertise to develop robust COVID-19 product and service offerings providing critical support for both clinical care and therapeutic development. The Company's ongoing efforts to utilize our portfolio of products and services to enable solutions for this evolving pandemic may partially offset the impact of our customer site closures.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Adjusted EPS was negatively impacted by COVID-19 primarily due to the sales impacts described above. We anticipate the short- and long-term impacts of COVID-19 on adjusted EPS to be similar to that of sales growth.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company remains in a strong financial position with sufficient available cash as well as access to additional funding if necessary, through our long-term debt agreement. We did not experience any material changes to our June 30, 2020 Balance Sheet resulting from COVID-19 for items such as additional reserves or asset impairments resulting from the pandemic.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company remains fully operational as we abide by local COVID-19 safety regulations across the world. To achieve this, the Company has certain employees working remotely and has adopted significant protective measures for our employees on site, including staggered shifts, social distancing and hygiene best practices recommended by the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) and local public health officials.&#xa0; In addition, the Company has taken additional steps to monitor and strengthen our supply chain to maintain an uninterrupted supply of our critical products and services.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: center; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <div class="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-left: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt">
   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">

     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">

     </div>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In fiscal 2020, Protein Sciences segment net sales increased 2% compared to fiscal 2019. Organic growth for the segment was 3% for the fiscal year, with&#xa0;foreign currency translation having an unfavorable impact of 1%, and acquisitions contributing an immaterial amount.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">Overall segment growth was driven by strong Bio-Pharma sales in&#xa0;North America and strong overall performance in China, which was partially offset by the disruption in research markets due to numerous customer site closures relating to the COVID-19 pandemic&#xa0;that occurred in the second half of fiscal 2020.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt;"><br /> In fiscal 2020, Diagnostics and&#xa0;Genomics segment net sales increased 8% compared to fiscal 2019. Organic growth was 8% with acquisitions and foreign currency having an immaterial impact on revenue.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt;">Overall segment revenue growth was driven by strong performance&#xa0;in our ExoDx Prostate Test,<i style="font-size: 10pt;"> RNA scope</i>, hematology, and assay development&#xa0;products lines prior to the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. The closure of academic site labs and limitation of non-essential medical procedures resulting from&#xa0;the COVID-19 pandemic significantly impacted sales of our <i style="font-size: 10pt;">RNA scope</i> product line and our ExoDx Prostate Test, respectively, in the latter portion of the fiscal year. These&#xa0;negative sales impacts&#xa0;were partially offset through growth in&#xa0;supplying specialty diagnostic antibodies and other raw materials&#xa0;to COVID-19 testing manufacturers.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 10pt;">In fiscal 2019, Protein Sciences segment net sales increased 13% compared to fiscal 2018. Organic growth for the segment was 13% for the fiscal year, with acquisitions contributing 2% and foreign currency translation having an unfavorable impact of 2%. Growth was broad-based and especially strong in the antibodies and cell therapy consumables as well as the Simple Western and Simple Plex instrument product categories.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In fiscal 2019, the Diagnostics and&#xa0;Genomics segment net sales increased 7% compared to fiscal 2018. Organic growth for the segment was 4% with acquisitions contributing 3%. Growth in this segment was primarily driven by strong <i>RNA scope</i> product sales.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <div class="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-left: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt">
   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">
       22
     </div>
    </div>
   </div>

    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell TOCLink" style="display: inline-block; text-align: left;">
      <a href="#toc" style="font-weight: initial; font-style: initial; font-variant: initial; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif;">Table of Contents</a>

  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Gross Margins</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Consolidated gross margins were 65.4%, 66.3%, and 67.2% in fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018. Consolidated gross margins were negatively impacted as a result of purchase accounting related to inventory in fiscal 2019 and 2018 and intangible assets acquired during fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018. Under purchase accounting, inventory is valued at fair value less expected selling and marketing costs, resulting in reduced margins in future periods as the inventory is sold. Excluding the impact of acquired inventory sold,&#xa0;amortization of intangibles, and stock compensation expense, adjusted gross margins were 70.3%, 71.5%, and 71.5%&#xa0;in fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018&#xa0;respectively. Fiscal 2020 adjusted gross margin was negatively impacted by product mix when compared to fiscal 2019 and fiscal 2018.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">A reconciliation of the reported consolidated gross margin percentages, adjusted for acquired inventory sold and intangible amortization included in cost of sales, is as follows:</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

We expect that, in the future, gross margins will continue to be impacted by the mix of our portfolio growing at different rates as well as future acquisitions.</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The small decrease&#xa0;in the Protein Sciences segment&#x2019;s gross margin percentage for fiscal 2020 as compared to fiscal 2019 and 2018 was primarily attributable to&#xa0;mix of product sales within&#xa0;the segment.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The increase in Diagnostics and Genomics in gross margin for fiscal 2020 was primarily due to volume leverage,&#xa0;operational productivity, and revenue growth against a similar cost base in recent acquisitions. The decrease in the Diagnostics and&#xa0;Genomics gross margin percentages for fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018 were due to negative&#xa0;gross margins for acquisitions made in the segment, namely ExosomeDx.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Selling, General and Administrative Expenses</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Selling, general and administrative expenses decreased $3.8&#xa0;million (1%) in fiscal 2020 when compared to fiscal 2019. Selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased primarily due to a reduction in corporate expenses and a gain&#xa0;resulting from a settlement of amounts held in escrow from the ExosomeDx acquisition between the Company and the former shareholders. These reductions to our selling, general, and administrative expenses were&#xa0;partially offset by an increase in&#xa0;expense&#xa0;within the segments.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Selling, general and administrative expense increased $23.7 million (10%) in fiscal 2019 when compared to fiscal 2018. The increase was&#xa0;primarily driven by an additional cost&#xa0;base from our fiscal 2019 acquisitions, additional stock-based compensation expense, and additional amortization expense associated with intangible assets recorded from our fiscal 2019 acquisitions. These increases were partially offset by a reduction in acquisition related expenses.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Consolidated selling, general and administrative expenses were composed of the following (in thousands):</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Research and Development Expenses</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Research and development expenses increased $2.8&#xa0;million (4%) and $7.1 million (13%) in fiscal 2020 and 2019, respectively, as compared to prior year periods. The increase in research and development expenses in fiscal 2020 as compared to fiscal 2019 was primarily attributable to continued investment in future growth platforms of the Company, recent acquisitions, and the development of new COVID-19 products.&#xa0;The increase in research and development expense in fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018 was primarily attributable to our ExosomeDx acquisition.&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Net Interest Income / (Expense)</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Net interest income/(expense) for fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018&#xa0;was $(18.6) million,&#xa0;$(21.1) million, and $(9.8) million,&#xa0;respectively. Net interest expense in fiscal 2020 decreased when compared to fiscal 2019 due to a reduction in our average long-term debt. Net interest expense increased in fiscal&#xa0;2019 when compared to fiscal 2018 due to an increase in our average long-term debt, resulting from&#xa0;the debt agreement the Company&#xa0;entered into in conjunction with our ExosomeDx acquisition.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During fiscal 2020, the Company recognized gains of $137.5 million related to changes in fair value&#xa0;associated with&#xa0;changes in the stock price of&#xa0;our&#xa0;ChemoCentryx, Inc. (CCXI) investment.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During fiscal 2019, the Company recognized losses of $16.1 million related to&#xa0;changes in fair value associated with&#xa0;changes in the stock price of&#xa0;our&#xa0;ChemoCentryx, Inc. (CCXI) investment, which were partially offset by a $3.7 million gain realized upon acquisition from our historical investment in B-MoGen.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During the third quarter of fiscal 2018, the Company recognized a $16.2 million impairment on the write-down of its investment in Astute Medical, Inc. (Astute) in anticipation of the amount of cash to be received upon completion of the sale of Astute to a third party. The Astute sale closed in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2018 at the anticipated amount. This loss was offset by a $16.1 million gain on the sale of a portion of the Company&#x2019;s investment in ChemoCentryx, Inc. (CCXI) and a $0.5 million gain on the sale of investment property in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2018. These gains and losses are included in other income (expense) in the accompanying Consolidated Statements of Earnings and Comprehensive Income.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Income Taxes</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Income taxes for fiscal 2020,&#xa0;2019, and 2018 were at effective rates of 17.1%, 14.2%, and (0.2)%,&#xa0;respectively, of consolidated earnings before income taxes. The change in the effective tax rate was driven by discrete tax items. The Company's discrete tax benefits in fiscal 2020 primarily related to share-based compensation excess tax benefits of $17.7&#xa0;million.&#xa0;The Company's discrete tax benefits in fiscal 2019 primarily related to share-based compensation excess tax benefits of $7.2 million,&#xa0;$3.2 million related to deductible acquisition payments made to employees and third parties,&#xa0;and $2.0&#xa0;million&#xa0;for tax refunds relating to certain&#xa0;state&#xa0;apportionments.&#xa0;In fiscal 2018, the Company recognized net discrete tax benefits of $34.4 million. The primary driver in fiscal 2018 discrete tax benefits was&#xa0;a&#xa0;discrete net tax benefit of&#xa0;$33.0&#xa0;million related to the Tax Act (as described in Note 11). Also impacting the Company&#x2019;s fiscal&#xa0;2018&#xa0;effective tax rate was a&#xa0;$2.2&#xa0;million tax benefit related to share-based compensation excess tax benefits offset by a net discrete tax expense of&#xa0;$4.2&#xa0;million related to the revaluation of contingent consideration, which is&#xa0;not&#xa0;a tax deductible expense.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">&#xa0;</p>

     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 12%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">24</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;"> <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">%</p> </td>
    </tr>

   </tbody>
  </table>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Depending on the nature of discrete tax items, our reported tax rate may not be consistent on a period to period basis. The Company independently calculates a non-GAAP adjusted tax rate considering the impact of discrete items and jurisdictional mix of the identified non-GAAP adjustments. The following table summarizes the reported GAAP tax rate and the effective Non-GAAP adjusted tax rate for the periods ended June 30, 2020, 2019, and 2018.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>

  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">The difference between the reported GAAP tax rate and non-GAAP tax rate applied to the identified non-GAAP adjustments for the fiscal years ended June 30, 2020 and June 30, 2019&#xa0;is&#xa0;primarily a result of discrete tax items. Refer to Note 11 for additional discussion relating to the change in discrete tax items between fiscal 2020&#xa0;and fiscal 2019.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">The difference between the reported GAAP tax rate and non-GAAP tax rate applied to the identified non-GAAP adjustments for the fiscal year&#xa0;ended June 30, 2018&#xa0;is due primarily to recording the items attributable to the new tax legislation in the U.S. which resulted in a $33.0 million tax benefit. Offsetting this benefit is the impact of the revaluation of contingent consideration which is not tax deductible. For the fiscal year ended June 30, 2018, the Company recorded acquisition related expense of $20.1 million related to the change in fair value of contingent consideration.<b>&#xa0;</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">
       26
     </div>

    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell TOCLink" style="display: inline-block; text-align: left;">
      <a href="#toc" style="font-weight: initial; font-style: initial; font-variant: initial; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif;">Table of Contents</a>

  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><b>LIQUIDITY AND CAPITAL RESOURCES</b></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Cash, cash equivalents and available-for-sale investments at June 30, 2020&#xa0;were $270.9&#xa0;million compared to $166.0&#xa0;million at June 30, 2019. Included in available-for-sale investments at June 30, 2020&#xa0;and June 30, 2019&#xa0;was the fair value of the Company's investment in CCXI of $87.8&#xa0;million and $38.2 million, respectively.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">At June 30, 2020, approximately 23% of the Company's cash and equivalent account balances of $146.6&#xa0;million were located in the U.S., with the remainder located in primarily in Canada, China, the U.K. and other European countries.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">At June 30, 2020, approximately 71% of the Company's available-for-sale investment account balances of $124.3&#xa0;million were located in the U.S., with the remaining 29% in China.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">The Company has either paid U.S. taxes on its undistributed foreign earnings or intends to indefinitely reinvest the undistributed earnings in the foreign operations or expects the earnings will be remitted in a tax neutral transaction. Management of the Company expects to be able to meet its cash and working capital requirements for operations, facility expansion, capital additions, and cash dividends for the foreseeable future, and at least the next 12 months, through currently available funds, including funds available through our&#xa0;line-of-credit&#xa0;and cash generated from operations.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During fiscal 2019, the Company acquired QT Holdings Corporation (Quad), Exosome Diagnostics, Inc. (Exosome), and the outstanding shares of our B-MoGen investment for approximately $20 million plus $51 million in potential contingent consideration,&#xa0; approximately $250 million plus $325 million in potential contingent consideration, and $17 million plus $38 million in potential contingent consideration, respectively. In connection with the acquisition of Exosome Diagnostics on August 1, 2018, the Company entered into a new credit facility governed by a Credit Agreement entered into on August 1, 2018 that matures on August 1, 2023. The Credit Agreement provides for a revolving credit facility of $600 million, which can be increased by an additional $200 million subject to certain conditions,&#xa0;and a term loan of $250 million. Borrowings under the Credit Agreement bear interest at a variable rate.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During fiscal 2018, the Company acquired Trevigen, Atlanta Biologicals and Eurocell Diagnostics for approximately $10.6 million, $51.3 million and $7.3 million, respectively. The acquisitions were financed through a combination of cash on hand and our revolving line of credit facility.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Future acquisition strategies may or may not require additional borrowings under the line-of-credit facility or other outside sources of funding.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Cash Flows From Operating Activities</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company generated cash from operations of $205.2 million, $181.6 million, and $170.4 million&#xa0;in fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018&#xa0;respectively. The increase in cash generated from operating activities in fiscal 2020 as compared to fiscal 2019 was mainly a result of higher GAAP earnings and lower accounts receivable balances in fiscal 2020, which were partially offset by the gain&#xa0;on investments&#xa0;included within earnings. The increase in cash generated from operating activities in fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018 was mainly the result of higher depreciation and amortization and adjustments to available-for-sale securities included with our GAAP earnings, partially offset by a reduction in GAAP earnings.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Cash Flows From Investing Activities</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">We continue to make investments in our business, including capital expenditures. The Company did not make any acquisitions in fiscal 2020. Net cash paid for acquisitions of Quad,&#xa0;Exosome, and B-MoGen&#xa0;was $289.5 million in fiscal 2019, a substantial increase from the net cash paid of $67.9 million for the Trevigen, Atlanta Biologicals and Eurocell Diagnostics acquisitions in fiscal 2018.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <div class="PGBK" style="width: 100%; margin-left: 0pt; margin-right: 0pt">
   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">
       27
     </div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <hr />
   <div class="PGHDR" style="text-align: left; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell TOCLink" style="display: inline-block; text-align: left;">
      <a href="#toc" style="font-weight: initial; font-style: initial; font-variant: initial; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif;">Table of Contents</a>
     </div>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">The Company's net proceeds (outflow) from the purchase, sale and maturity of available-for-sale investments in fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018&#xa0;were $76.9 million,&#xa0;($21.9 million), and $27.8 million, respectively. The increase in fiscal 2020 compared to fiscal 2019 was driven by the sale of a portion of the Company&#x2019;s investment in CCXI in fiscal 2020. The decrease&#xa0;in fiscal 2019 as compared to fiscal 2018 was driven by the sale of a portion of the Company&#x2019;s investment in CCXI in fiscal 2018 and additional purchases of bonds&#xa0;in fiscal 2019. The Company's investment policy is to place excess cash in certificates of deposit&#xa0;with the objective of obtaining the highest possible return while minimizing risk and keeping the funds accessible.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">Capital additions in fiscal year 2020, 2019, and 2018&#xa0;were $51.7 million, $25.4 million, and $20.9 million. Increase in fiscal 2020 capital expenditures&#xa0;due to investments in new&#xa0;buildings, in particular, the&#xa0;Company's cGMP manufacturing facility.&#xa0;Capital additions planned for fiscal 2021&#xa0;are approximately $45&#xa0;million and are expected to be financed through currently available cash and cash generated from operations.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;"><i><b>Cash Flows From Financing Activities</b></i></p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">In fiscal 2020, 2019, and 2018, the Company paid cash dividends of $48.9&#xa0;million, $48.4 million, $48.0 million, respectively. The Board of Directors periodically considers the payment of cash dividends.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Company received $71.0 million, $38.0 million, $19.2 million, for the exercise of options for 56,000, 382,000, 204,000 shares&#xa0;of common stock in fiscal 2020, 2019 and 2018 , respectively.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: justify; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">During fiscal 2020, the Company drew $40 million under its revolving line-of-credit facility and made repayments on its line-of-credit of $188.5 million.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2019, the Company drew $580.0 million under its revolving line-of-credit facility to fund its acquisition of Quad, Exosome, and B-MoGen and made repayments on its line-of-credit of $413.5 million.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2018, the Company drew $55.0 million under its revolving line-of-credit facility to fund its acquisition of Atlanta Biologicals and made repayments on its line-of-credit of $59.5 million.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2020, the Company made $4.4 million ($4 million for Quad and $0.4 million for B-MoGen) in&#xa0;cash payments towards the Quad, Exosome, and B-MoGen&#xa0;contingent consideration liabilities. Of the $4.4 million in total payments, $3.4 million is classified as financing on the statement of cash flows. The remaining $1 million is recorded as operating on the statement of cash flows&#xa0;as it represents the consideration liability that exceeds the amount of the contingent consideration liability recognized at the acquisition date.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2019, the Company made no cash payments towards the Quad, Exosome, and B-MoGen&#xa0;contingent consideration liabilities.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2018, the Company made $88.5 million ($50 million for ACD, $35 million for CyVek, and $3.5 million for Zephyrus) in cash payments towards the ACD, CyVek and Zephyrus contingent consideration liabilities. Of the $88.5 million in total payments, $61.9 million is classified as financing on the statement of cash flows. The remaining $26.6 million is recorded as operating on the statement of cash flows as it represents the consideration liability that exceeds the amount of the contingent consideration liability recognized at the acquisition date.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">In accordance with the terms of the purchase agreement, during fiscal 2019, the Company made the final payment of $1.4 million related to Eurocell.&#xa0;In accordance with the terms of the purchase agreement, during the first quarter of fiscal 2018, the Company made the final $2.3 million payment for the Space acquisition. These&#xa0;payments were included within other financing activities.</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; text-align: justify;">During fiscal 2020 and&#xa0;2019, the Company repurchased $50.1 million and $15.4 million, respectively&#xa0;in share repurchases included as a cash outflow within Financing Activities. The Company did not repurchase any shares in fiscal 2018.&#xa0;</p>
  <p style="margin: 0pt; text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</p>

   <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
    <div class="hf-row">
     <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: Times New Roman;">
       28

     <td style="width: 1%; padding-bottom: 3px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">$</td>
     <td style="width: 9%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">20,090</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; padding-bottom: 3px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">$</td>
     <td style="width: 9%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">48,409</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; padding-bottom: 3px; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt;">&#xa0;</td>

     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">$</td>
     <td style="width: 9%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">338,949</td>

     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt;">&#xa0;</td>
     <td style="width: 1%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">$</td>
     <td style="width: 9%; text-align: right; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-left: 0pt; border-bottom-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-bottom-style: double;">37,316</td>
